title: MCP
intro: Maintain personal MCP connections here; mount them on assistants in Assistant management for chat tools.

extra.edit: Blank means no change. HTTP/SSE: {"url":"https://..."}; stdio: {"command":"npx","args":["-y","pkg"]}. Loaded from server when editing.

metadata.label: metadata (optional JSON)
metadata.extra: JSON object; blank to skip or keep unchanged on edit.

extra.edit: If configured, blank keeps existing; new value overwrites encrypted storage.
extra.create: Optional; server needs MCP_CREDENTIALS_MASTER_KEY to save.

help.intro: Authentication sent when connecting to the MCP endpoint (e.g. API key, Bearer token).
help.http: HTTP/SSE: usually a token string; for multiple headers use JSON e.g. {"Authorization":"Bearer …"} (merged with metadata headers).
help.stdio: STDIO: usually omit; put secrets in connection env if required by docs.
help.storage: Saved encrypted; never shown in lists/API. MCP_CREDENTIALS_MASTER_KEY encrypts storage—it is not the token for the MCP provider.

testChoice.title: Unsaved changes
testChoice.body: Connection test uses saved server config. Choose:

deleteBlocked.title: Cannot delete
deleteBlocked.body: Go to <assistantsLink/> to unmount this MCP first.

delete.title: Delete this MCP configuration?
delete.description: Cannot be undone. Deletion fails if still referenced by assistants.

toast.endpointInvalidJson: Connection params must be valid JSON object (e.g. {"url":"https://..."})
toast.endpointParseError: Connection params JSON could not be parsed or is not an object
toast.metadataInvalidJson: metadata must be a valid JSON object
